creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->feedback

The correct patch is to exactly undo the following change: 

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk.diff?r1=1.617;r2=1.618;f=h 

Otherwise, every port buid fails with: 

make: don't know how to make check-makefile. Stop
